headline: NEWS MEDIA ADVISORY: Ray Kurzweil Keynotes Absolute Security Resilient CISO Summit During RSAC 2026
summary: SEATTLE & SAN FRANCISCO, March 24, 2026--(RSAC) — Absolute Security, an enterprise cyber resilience leader, today announced renowned futurist, inventor, author, and AI thought leader Ray Kurzweil will headline the Resilient CISO Summit. During his keynote, Cybersecurity in the Age of Exponential Intelligence, Kurzweil will provide groundbreaking insights into the future of AI and its critical impact on cybersecurity leadership. headline: What to Expect From Paychex's Next Quarterly Earnings Report
summary: Paychex will release its third-quarter earnings tomorrow, and analysts anticipate a double-digit bottom-line growth.
